prompt: LEFT PANEL: A dreamy anime-inspired Korean/Japanese boy with soft pale skin, messy ash-black hair, subtle red eyes, delicate facial features, oversized cozy scarf, layered cardigan and sweater outfit, watercolor ink illustration style mixed with semi-realistic manga rendering. Surround him with beach-themed scrapbook elements including shell illustrations, butterflies, ocean polaroids, sunglasses photo cards, masking tape, handwritten notes, delicate floral line art, pastel turquoise sky, sandy beige palette, soft tropical aesthetic, luxury magazine moodboard vibe, clean minimal composition.
